name: veris-core-bench
description: A small set of research questions for faithfulness evaluation over the cs.LG/cs.CL/cs.AI corpus.
questions: What approaches improve sample efficiency in multi-agent reinforcement learning?
How are transformers used for coordination between autonomous agents?
What are common methods for retrieval-augmented generation?
How do diffusion models generate images from text prompts?
What techniques reduce hallucination in large language models?
